text:
Bar Jack Princess Hotel (バージャック プリンセスホテル, Bā Jakku Purinsesu Hoteru) is a high-class hotel in the Glam Gas Land. Hunter × Hunter: Hisoka's Past (One-Shot) 

Overview

The Bar Jack Princess Hotel is where the Moritonio Troupe put on a performance and this is also the place where senior member Yasuha made his last performance. 

Plot

Hisoka's Past spin-off

The Moritonio Troupe put on a performance at the Bar Jack stage and due to the newest member Hisoka outperforming the senior member Yasuha in the juggling act, he quietly leaves the troupe thereafter. 

References
